title: GLLVM mission control
subtitle: Local operating board for gllvmTMB capability truth. Current focus: latent(lv = ~ x) ordinary, Julia-bridge, phylo, and mixed-family evidence.
source: gllvmTMB PR #581 merged to main at 12526a15. Post-merge R-CMD-check run 28476941515 and pkgdown run 28477809749 both passed; the public extract_lv_effects reference page now shows axis_effect as the default with conf.level, alpha SE/CIs, and explicit trait_effect B_lv SE/CIs. GLLVM.jl PR #127 remains closed/parked as blocked evidence. Current v1 decision: retire/park public source-specific phylo lv under the current evidence; keep phylo_latent(..., lv = ~ x) fail-loud. No bootstrap rescue is planned. Alpha Wald output is conditional axis/access-effect output, not the Model A evidence target. Profile-LR can return only as a selected-entry truth-inclusion canary after Fisher names a genuinely revised estimand or regime. Old evidence is negative: bootstrap_basic 591/720 = 0.821; optimistic cancelled-task bound 671/800 = 0.839; local task-8 entry-71 profile_truth LR 9.9918 > 3.8415; narrowed K=1 profile_truth 98/100 with two converged misses. Bench-only profile_direct_slope passed early diagnostics but failed the K=1 20-replicate no-miss gate at 96/100 with four converged misses and max LR 6.6614 > 3.8415. Aggregate 96/100 is nominal-compatible at this denominator, but it is not public support. LV structural dependencies are now truth-locked: source-specific lv guards stay covered/fail-loud, the mixed-family bridge row is complete balanced point/postfit only, and mixed-family X/X_lv/masks/CIs remain blocked. No active compute is claimed; Totoro remains diagnostic-only and DRAC claim-only after a future ADEMP gate passes.

claim_guard.title: Claim boundary
claim_guard.text: On main, extract_lv_effects() defaults to axis_effect alpha and returns Wald SE/CIs when the fitted native TMB sdreport supports them. These alpha intervals remain conditional on the fitted loading/axis convention, not broad calibrated coverage claims. Rotation-invariant trait effects remain explicit as type = "trait_effect" with B_lv = Lambda alpha^T and Wald SE/CIs. Ordinary C1 is closed for the named regimes; source-specific phylo lv is retired/parked for v1, mixed-family lv is blocked, and calibrated Julia bridge CIs remain partial. The mixed-family Julia bridge row is point/postfit only for complete balanced Gaussian + Poisson + Binomial vectors; fixed X, predictor-informed X_lv, masks, missing responses, newdata, and CIs remain gated. For phylo Model A, bootstrap is out for the current arc, profile-LR is only a selected-entry canary after a genuinely new target is named, and profile_truth plus profile_direct_slope canaries both fired stop rules. Do not call this partial support; the current action is parking, not another same-route rerun.

notes.merged: covered rows have linked local/PR evidence through PR #581; post-merge main R-CMD-check and pkgdown are green
notes.ready: no open ready LV PR remains after #581 merged
notes.active: no active LV compute is claimed; Narval login/status reads stalled, and no production fan-out is running
notes.queued: no production phylo queue should launch after the local profile_truth misses or the profile_direct_slope 20-replicate strict-gate failure; no bootstrap rescue; source-specific phylo lv is retired/parked for v1
notes.partial: broad LV, source-specific phylo lv, Julia CI calibration, and mixed-family rows are not complete
notes.blocked: phylo Model A production coverage remains blocked/parked for v1. Old population-target diagnostics failed, and the realized direct-slope route failed the strict K=1 20-replicate canary despite 96/100 aggregate coverage. Source-specific phylo lv stays fail-loud

truth_cards.label: V1 distance
truth_cards.note: The gllvmTMB ordinary LV arc is merged and green through PR #581. The remaining two-package LV caveat is the GLLVM.jl phylo weak-cell route, now retired/parked for v1 rather than solved; mixed/source/bridge-CI claims remain outside V1.

truth_cards.label: Merged LV slices
truth_cards.note: Main is merged and green through PR #581.

truth_cards.label: Open LV PRs
truth_cards.note: No open gllvmTMB PRs after PR #581 merged at 12526a15. Post-merge main R-CMD-check and pkgdown passed.

truth_cards.label: Shannon audit
truth_cards.note: gllvmTMB PR queue is clear and main/pkgdown are green. The Dropbox checkout remains dirty and should stay out of validation; phylo GLLVM.jl PR #127 is closed/parked as a two-package caveat.

truth_cards.label: Coverage gap
truth_cards.note: GLLVM.jl phylo Model A production coverage is blocked and public source-specific v1 exposure is retired/parked. The completed bootstrap_basic evidence cannot reach the 0.92 gate even under an optimistic cancelled-task assumption; bootstrap is not the next route. Direct saturated slopes track B_lv, so this is a finite-sample slope/interval-calibration problem, not an extractor artifact. PR #127 is closed/parked. The local seed-matched task-8 entry-71 profile_truth canary missed truth with LR 9.9918 > 3.8415, and the K=1 20-replicate profile gate covered only 98/100 selected entries. Bench-only profile_direct_slope passed early diagnostics but then failed the strict K=1 20-replicate no-miss gate at 96/100 with four converged misses. No source-specific lv exposure is allowed yet; any future work needs a newly predeclared ADEMP estimand/gate.

truth_cards.label: Small-N intervals
truth_cards.note: PR #571 merged at 4b8b3d3 with the native Gaussian r500 grid for both wald_z and wald_t_unit plus compact evidence artifacts. Fresh local focused test passed, local R CMD check --no-manual passed 0 errors, 0 warnings, 0 notes in 6m29.4s, PR Ubuntu R-CMD-check succeeded, and the post-merge main R-CMD-check completed successfully at 2026-06-29T23:20:00Z. Coverage was 0.9269-0.9610 with MCSE 0.0088-0.0119; t was never worse than z and improved 12/14 target rows. This does not cover phylo, binomial, non-Gaussian, mixed, or bridge CI intervals.

truth_cards.label: Binomial intervals
truth_cards.note: PR #580 merged the native binomial rank-1 multi-trial standard-link r500 interval evidence at 20f09546; post-merge main R-CMD-check and pkgdown passed. No nonstandard binomial, native count-family, mixed, mask, source/tier, or Julia bridge CI claim.

truth_cards.label: CI reader
truth_cards.note: PR #570 merged at 46c5884. It surfaces Julia-bridge X_lv Wald payloads through extract_lv_effects() as reader plumbing only. Focused tests, CI-shaped local R CMD check, after-task validation, and GitHub R-CMD-check passed. This is not calibrated coverage.

truth_cards.label: Bernoulli depth
truth_cards.note: PR #572 merged at cf2f4f9 after green PR Ubuntu R-CMD-check. It adds single-trial logit/probit/cloglog recovery and separation diagnostics. Post-merge main R-CMD-check run 28409754509 completed successfully.

truth_cards.label: Factor lv runtime
truth_cards.note: PR #574 merged at 5e708740 after green PR Ubuntu R-CMD-check run 28414061056. It adds ordinary Gaussian factor-predictor runtime, B_lv recovery, rare nonempty level smoke, and empty-level rejection; focused test passed 45/45, parser guard passed, local R CMD check --no-manual passed 0/0/0, post-merge main R-CMD-check run 28414574396 completed successfully, and post-merge pkgdown run 28414994265 completed successfully. No interval, non-Gaussian, missing-response, mixed-family, tier, or structured-source claim.

truth_cards.label: Masked responses
truth_cards.note: PR #575 merged at 86188d69. It covers ordinary Gaussian response=include masking when unit-level lv predictors are observed/complete: complete-case likelihood and parameter match, X_lv_B alignment, B_lv recovery, retained masked rows, and missing-predictor rejection. Focused test passed 50/50, parser guard passed, local R CMD check --no-manual passed 0/0/0, PR Ubuntu R-CMD-check run 28416296110 passed, post-merge main R-CMD-check run 28416802599 is green, and post-merge pkgdown run 28417152793 is green. No missing lv predictors, mi() inside lv, non-Gaussian masks, factor-valued masks, mixed-family masks, bridge masks, source/tier masks, or interval claim.

truth_cards.label: X + X_lv guard
truth_cards.note: PR #576 merged at f9bdbb46. It rejects any extra fixed-effect RHS covariate alongside lv, including exact overlap x + lv=~x and non-overlap z + lv=~x. Local parser guard, pkgdown check, targeted article smoke, R CMD check --no-manual 0/0/0, git diff --check, and after-task validation passed. PR Ubuntu R-CMD-check run 28418870376, post-merge main R-CMD-check run 28419398630, and post-merge pkgdown run 28419946303 are green. This is a fail-loud guard, not a new fit regime.

truth_cards.label: Source lv guard
truth_cards.note: PR #573 merged at 2fc42935 after green PR Ubuntu R-CMD-check. It proves ordinary latent lv desugars, source-specific spellings fail loudly, and deprecated/internal aliases cannot silently drop lv metadata. Post-merge main R-CMD-check run 28411534774 and pkgdown run 28412018639 completed successfully.

truth_cards.label: Native non-Gaussian guard
truth_cards.note: PR #577 merged at 5710e6ce. It proves native TMB rejects unsupported non-binomial latent(lv = ~ x) calls for Poisson, NB1, NB2, lognormal, Gamma, Beta, Tweedie, Student-t, truncated Poisson, truncated NB2, beta-binomial, delta-lognormal, and delta-Gamma. Focused guard passed 13/13, parser guard passed, pkgdown check passed, local R CMD check --no-manual passed 0/0/0, after-task validation passed, PR Ubuntu R-CMD-check run 28421490866 passed, post-merge main R-CMD-check run 28422049207 passed, and post-merge pkgdown run 28422549178 passed. This is fail-loud evidence only, not native non-binomial support.

truth_cards.label: Family boundary guard
truth_cards.note: PR #578 merged at 65136f96. It proves top-level latent(lv = ~ x) calls reject binomial cauchit, ordinal_probit, and mixed Gaussian/binomial/Poisson before fitting. Focused guard passed 3/3, parser guard passed, native non-Gaussian guard passed 13/13, pkgdown check passed, local R CMD check --no-manual passed 0/0/0, after-task validation passed, PR Ubuntu R-CMD-check run 28424216581 passed, post-merge main R-CMD-check run 28424798107 passed, and post-merge pkgdown run 28425402434 passed. This is fail-loud evidence only, not nonstandard binomial, ordinal, or mixed-family support.

truth_cards.label: REML/formula guard
truth_cards.note: PR #579 merged at a7599b2b. It proves top-level latent(lv = ~ x) calls reject REML = TRUE, offset(), mi(), smooth terms, and random-effect terms inside lv before fitting. Focused guard passed 5/5, parser guard passed, family-boundary guard passed 3/3, pkgdown check passed, local R CMD check --no-manual passed 0/0/0, after-task validation passed, PR Ubuntu R-CMD-check run 28427646094 passed, post-merge main R-CMD-check run 28428340817 passed, and post-merge pkgdown run 28429099746 passed. This is fail-loud evidence only, not REML or richer lv formula support.

truth_cards.label: Mixed distributions
truth_cards.note: The narrow Julia bridge mixed-family row is complete balanced Gaussian + Poisson + Binomial point/postfit only. It does not admit fixed X, predictor-informed X_lv, masks, missing responses, newdata, or CIs. Mixed-family latent(lv = ~ x) remains blocked/fail-loud.

truth_cards.label: Phylo DRAC launcher
truth_cards.note: The weak-cell bootstrap_basic, direct-mean, local profile_truth, and profile_direct_slope diagnostics are complete enough to stop spending cores on this route. No bootstrap rescue is planned. Profile-LR is reserved for selected-entry canaries after a genuinely new target/regime is named. New DRAC/Totoro work should wait for a future ADEMP redesign. Source-specific phylo lv is retired/parked for v1.

truth_cards.label: Axis alpha SEs
truth_cards.note: extract_lv_effects(fit) now returns axis_effect rows by default on main, with estimate/std.error/lower/upper for alpha when sdreport is PD. type = "trait_effect" returns B_lv = Lambda alpha^T with SE/CIs. Intervals are Wald/conditional, not broad coverage-calibrated.

lv_arc.subtitle: Focused lane inside mission control. Top rows now separate merged ordinary LV evidence, blocked phylo diagnostics, and deferred source/mixed-family claims.

notes.merged: covered rows have linked local/PR evidence through PR #581, with post-merge main CI and pkgdown green
notes.ready: no ready LV PR remains after #581 merged
notes.active: no LV compute race is currently active; old DRAC/Totoro lanes are closed, stopped, cancelled, held, or unread due to Narval login/status stalls
notes.partial: broad LV, source-specific phylo lv, Julia CI calibration, and mixed-family claims remain outside the safe boundary
notes.queued: no production phylo coverage queue should launch after the local profile_truth and profile_direct_slope misses; no bootstrap rescue is planned and K=1 same-route scaling is stopped
notes.blocked: phylo Model A production coverage is blocked/parked for v1: bootstrap_basic observed rows are 591/720 = 0.821, local seed-matched task-8 entry-71 profile_truth missed truth with LR 9.9918 > 3.8415, K=1 20-replicate profile_truth covered only 98/100 selected entries, and profile_direct_slope failed the strict 96/100 no-miss gate

rows.evidence: LV arc is split into point routes, recovery, intervals, phylo, and mixed-family rows. No broad complete claim.

Parser/API, X_lv_B, alpha_lv_B, and B_lv_unit are present. PR #581 is merged and makes alpha axis_effect the default extractor target with SE/CIs, while B_lv remains explicit as trait_effect. Broad lv support is still not claimed.

PR #581 merged at 12526a15 and is on main. Native TMB alpha_lv_B rows surface std.error/lower/upper from sdreport fixed effects when se = TRUE and pdHess/sdreport permit it; conf.level is configurable. Julia bridge schema accepts future alpha interval payloads and returns NA intervals when absent. Post-merge main R-CMD-check and pkgdown passed, and the public reference page is updated.

PR #574 merged at 5e708740. It adds a three-level ordinary Gaussian DGP, trait-by-level B_lv recovery, rare nonempty factor-level smoke, and empty-level rejection. devtools::test(filter = "lv-factor-runtime") passed 45/45; lv-parser-guard passed; local R CMD check --no-manual passed 0/0/0; PR Ubuntu R-CMD-check run 28414061056, post-merge main R-CMD-check run 28414574396, and post-merge pkgdown run 28414994265 passed. No interval, non-Gaussian, missing-response, mixed-family, tier, or structured-source claim.

rows.lane: Missing responses with observed lv predictors
rows.evidence: PR #575 merged at 86188d69. It adds ordinary Gaussian response=include masking for observed complete unit-level lv predictors, complete-case logLik/parameter match, X_lv_B alignment, retained masked-row sentinel checks, B_lv recovery, extract_lv_effects() validation row checks, and explicit rejection for missing lv predictor values. devtools::test(filter = "lv-missing-response") passed 50/50; lv-parser-guard passed; local R CMD check --no-manual passed 0/0/0; PR Ubuntu R-CMD-check run 28416296110 passed. Post-merge main R-CMD-check run 28416802599 is green and post-merge pkgdown run 28417152793 is green. Missing lv predictors, mi() inside lv, non-Gaussian masks, factor-valued masks, mixed-family masks, bridge masks, source/tier masks, and intervals remain outside the claim.

PR #576 merged at f9bdbb46. The branch changes preflight so predictor-informed lv cannot yet be combined with extra fixed-effect RHS covariates, including exact overlap x + lv=~x and non-overlap z + lv=~x. Local parser guard, pkgdown check, targeted article smoke, R CMD check --no-manual 0/0/0, git diff --check, and after-task validation passed. PR Ubuntu R-CMD-check run 28418870376, post-merge main R-CMD-check run 28419398630, and post-merge pkgdown run 28419946303 are green. This is a fail-loud guard, not a new fit regime.

Focused Gaussian DGP and B_lv_unit recovery landed, and local r500 Wald/t coverage evidence is merged. After PR #581, B_lv is the explicit trait_effect view with SE/CIs; the default extractor target is alpha axis_effect. Raw Lambda alone remains outside K > 1 gates.

PR #571 merged at 4b8b3d3. It carries 500 reps/cell over four ordinary Gaussian cells for paired wald_z and wald_t_unit rows: 14,000 long rows / 28 summary rows; all optimizer fits converged; eligible denominators were 500, 487, 487, and 479 by cell; all target/method rows passed 0.92-0.98 with MCSE 0.0088-0.0119. Fresh local focused test and local R CMD check --no-manual passed 0/0/0; PR Ubuntu R-CMD-check passed; post-merge main R-CMD-check completed successfully at 2026-06-29T23:20:00Z.

Pure logit/probit/cloglog point routes are admitted. Multi-trial recovery, Bernoulli single-trial depth, and rank-1 multi-trial standard-link r500 B_lv Wald interval evidence are merged through PR #580 with post-merge main R-CMD-check and pkgdown green. Broader native non-Gaussian, nonstandard binomial, mixed-family, mask, source/tier, and Julia CI claims remain gated.

PR #572 merged at cf2f4f9 on 2026-06-29T23:35:02Z after green PR Ubuntu R-CMD-check. It adds deterministic single-trial logit/probit/cloglog DGPs, per-trait separation diagnostics, and B_lv recovery. Post-merge main R-CMD-check run 28409754509 completed successfully. Interval claims remain blocked.

Ordinary bridge point routes work in narrow scope. PR #581 updates the extractor schema so future bridge alpha interval payloads can be surfaced, but current bridge CI calibration is still not claimed.
Merged as ordinary unit-tier Julia bridge point scope.

Merged as ordinary unit-tier Julia bridge point scope in PR #569 at 1d15e01. Targeted NB2/Gamma/Beta X_lv route test passed 24/24 locally; live smoke had passed for nbinom2, gamma, and beta point routes. No CI calibration or recovery grid claim.

PR #577 merged at 5710e6ce. It adds top-level fail-loud tests proving native TMB rejects unsupported non-binomial latent(lv = ~ x) calls for Poisson, NB1, NB2, lognormal, Gamma, Beta, Tweedie, Student-t, truncated Poisson, truncated NB2, beta-binomial, delta-lognormal, and delta-Gamma. Focused guard, parser guard, pkgdown check, local R CMD check --no-manual, after-task validation, PR Ubuntu R-CMD-check run 28421490866, post-merge main R-CMD-check run 28422049207, and post-merge pkgdown run 28422549178 passed. This is fail-loud evidence only; native non-binomial lv support remains blocked.

PR #578 merged at 65136f96. It adds top-level fail-loud tests proving binomial(link = "cauchit"), ordinal_probit(), and mixed Gaussian/binomial/Poisson latent(lv = ~ x) calls reject before fitting. Focused guard, parser guard, native non-Gaussian guard, pkgdown check, local R CMD check --no-manual, after-task validation, PR Ubuntu R-CMD-check run 28424216581, post-merge main R-CMD-check run 28424798107, and post-merge pkgdown run 28425402434 passed. This preserves the pure logit/probit/cloglog binomial claim boundary and keeps nonstandard binomial, ordinal, and mixed families blocked.

PR #579 merged at a7599b2b. It adds top-level fail-loud tests proving REML = TRUE, offset(), mi(), smooth terms, and random-effect terms inside lv reject before fitting. Focused guard, parser guard, family-boundary guard, pkgdown check, local R CMD check --no-manual, after-task validation, PR Ubuntu R-CMD-check run 28427646094, post-merge main R-CMD-check run 28428340817, and post-merge pkgdown run 28429099746 passed. This keeps predictor-informed latent scores ML-only and fixed-effect-formula-only until separate derivations and recovery/interval evidence land.

Merged in PR #570 at 46c5884. It surfaces retained Julia-bridge X_lv Wald payloads through extract_lv_effects() as reader plumbing only; focused extractor test passed 15/15, routed Gaussian test passed 7/7, CI-shaped local R CMD check --no-manual passed 0/0/0, after-task validation passed, and GitHub R-CMD-check passed. This is not calibrated coverage.

Local GLLVM.jl Model A targeted tests and stale-guard fixes are banked, and selected-entry profile canary tooling is local-only. Production promotion is retired/parked for v1 by the weak-cell diagnostics: bootstrap_basic did not clear the gate and is no longer a rescue route, direct saturated slopes track B_lv, local seed-matched task-8 entry-71 profile_truth missed truth with LR 9.9918 > 3.8415, K=1 20-replicate profile_truth covered only 98/100 selected entries, and profile_direct_slope failed the strict 96/100 no-miss gate.

Final weak-cell bootstrap_basic diagnostic for p=80,K=2,lambda=0.5 B_lv is blocked/parked for v1: valid observed rows give 591/720 = 0.821 entry coverage; even granting the cancelled task 1 perfect coverage would reach only 671/800 = 0.839. Narval direct-mean comparator showed saturated Y~X_lv slopes and latent-product B_lv slopes align, including the weak task 8, so the failure is finite-sample data-level slope/interval calibration rather than extraction. A local seed-matched task-8 entry-71 profile_truth canary also missed truth with LR 9.9918 > 3.8415, and profile_direct_slope failed the strict K=1 no-miss gate. Same-route bootstrap/Wald/t-Wald/percentile/profile endpoint reruns are retired.

Keep source-specific lv grammar fail-loud after the v1 parking decision. PR #573 merged the source-specific guard tests for phylo, animal, spatial, kernel, and deprecated/internal alias lv metadata handling.

PR #573 merged at 2fc42935 after green PR Ubuntu R-CMD-check. It tests ordinary latent lv desugaring, source-specific phylo/animal/spatial/kernel lv rejection, and deprecated/internal alias metadata: raw rr(..., lv=~x) is preserved into X_lv_B, while raw diag/phylo_rr/spde with lv fail loudly. Focused source guard, broader parser guard, local R CMD check --no-manual, post-merge main R-CMD-check, and pkgdown run 28412018639 all passed.
Backlog, not V1. Start later with balanced Gaussian + binomial + Poisson, no masks, no fixed X, no missing responses, no CIs.
No phylo-collinear arm in Model A. This is a separate Model B derivation and validation lane.

Ordinary native TMB Gaussian t evidence merged in PR #571: r500 paired wald_z/wald_t_unit rows passed the ordinary Gaussian coverage band, and t was never worse than z in the recorded grid. GLLVM.jl also has a Gaussian-only confint_lv_effects(method=:wald_t_unit) comparator for phylo B_lv; Nibi 16950659 completed the p=80,K=2,lambda=0.5 10-seed diagnostic with Wald 0.844 vs wald_t_unit 0.845. That phylo result is useful negative diagnostic evidence, not production coverage.

Launcher tooling exists, and selected-entry profile-LR B_lv canary tooling is now local-only. The current old route remains closed as negative evidence: no bootstrap rescue, and profile-LR only after a genuinely new target/regime is named. Local GLLVM.jl closeout commit 7d6985d records the blocked weak-cell diagnostic, and the later K=1 20-replicate profile gate covered only 98/100 selected entries. Narval/Nibi/Rorqual/Totoro races are closed, cancelled, stopped, held, or unread due to Narval login/status stalls; Trillium remains held because small jobs reserve whole 192-core nodes. Next compute should wait for structural redesign or v1 retirement.

distributions.boundary: PR #581 is on main and makes alpha axis_effect the default extractor view with Wald SE/CIs; B_lv remains explicit as trait_effect with SE/CIs. REML/AI-REML with lv remains fail-loud guarded by PR #579.

Pure binomial logit/probit/cloglog only. Rank-1 multi-trial standard-link interval evidence is merged through PR #580. Nonstandard links, native count families, ordinal, mixed rows, masks, source/tier expansion, and Julia bridge CIs remain gated.
PR #572 covers single-trial logit/probit/cloglog point recovery and separation diagnostics. No interval calibration.
Ordinary unit-tier Julia bridge route. Native TMB lv=~x rejection is locally guarded; no calibrated coverage or mixed-family claim.

Merged PR #569 admits Julia-bridge point routing; local CI-reader probe reads Wald payloads; native TMB lv=~x rejection is merged in PR #577. Dispersion and calibrated intervals stay out of the claim.
Merged PR #569 admits Julia-bridge point routing; local CI-reader probe reads Wald payloads; native TMB lv=~x rejection is merged in PR #577. No missing-response, mask, or calibrated interval claim.
Merged PR #569 admits Julia-bridge point routing on valid open-interval responses; local CI-reader probe reads Wald payloads only; native TMB lv=~x rejection is merged in PR #577.
NB1 native TMB lv=~x rejection is merged in PR #577; ordinal_probit lv=~x rejection is merged in PR #578. Support would need separate family-specific derivation, simulation, docs, and gates.
First backlog cell only: balanced data, no masks, no fixed X, no missing responses, no CIs.
Only after single-family point routes and the first balanced mixed cell are stable.

PR #575 covers ordinary Gaussian response masks only when unit-level lv predictors are observed and complete. Missing lv predictors, mi() inside lv, factor-valued masks, non-Gaussian masks, mixed-family masks, bridge masks, source/tier masks, X + X_lv, and intervals remain blocked or guard-only.

Top-level binomial cauchit, ordinal_probit, and mixed Gaussian/binomial/Poisson lv=~x calls fail loudly; PR CI, post-merge main R-CMD-check, and post-merge pkgdown are green. This protects the pure binomial logit/probit/cloglog boundary and keeps mixed-family backlog blocked.

Ordinary Gaussian r500 Wald/t coverage evidence merged in PR #571.
Default axis_effect alpha SE/CIs and explicit trait_effect B_lv SE/CIs merged in PR #581.
Binomial B_lv local r500 coverage evidence recorded; package check clean.

slices.name: GLLVM.jl targeted local tests and CI trio smoke are banked.
Local stale-guard/status-boundary fixes are documented, but not enough for R exposure.
p=80,K=2,lambda=0.5 weak-cell bootstrap_basic cannot reach the 0.92 gate.
Expose phylo_latent(..., lv = ~ x) in gllvmTMB only after a new method decision and maintainer sign-off.
Balanced Gaussian + Poisson + Binomial bridge point/postfit row is guarded as no fixed X, no X_lv, no masks, no missing responses, no CIs.
Add NB2/Gamma/Beta mixed R bridge cells only after a separate parity slice widens the component contract.
Missing responses and masks require separate gates.
Delta/hurdle latent-scale correlation requires separate two-scale derivation.

active_work.text: Default axis_effect alpha SE/CIs plus explicit trait_effect B_lv SE/CIs are on main at 12526a15. Post-merge R-CMD-check and pkgdown both passed, and the public reference page is updated.
The deployed extract_lv_effects reference page shows type = c("axis_effect", "trait_effect"), conf.level = 0.95, alpha SEs from alpha_lv_B, and trait-effect SEs from ADREPORT(B_lv_unit).

Council decision is now explicit and selected-entry profile tooling exists locally. Method lock: no bootstrap rescue; profile-LR is only a selected-entry canary after a genuinely new target/regime is named; alpha Wald is conditional axis/access-effect output. The cheaper profile_truth canary was run locally on the seed-matched task-8 entry-71 row and missed truth: LR 9.9918 > 3.8415, and the K=1 20-replicate gate later covered only 98/100 selected entries. Earlier Narval endpoint-profile jobs 64462844, 64463813, 64466208, and 64468504 produced no profile result; capped exact job 64471433 could not be read because Narval login/status reads stalled. Same-route bootstrap/Wald/t-Wald/percentile/profile endpoint reruns are retired; no production fan-out and no source-specific lv grammar exposure.

Diagnostic-only local K=1 Gaussian Model A profile_truth wave at p=20, n_sites=200, lambda=0.5 fired the stop rule: 20/20 fits converged, 100/100 selected entries were usable, but only 98/100 included truth. Converged misses were task 15 entry 10 (LR 4.942) and task 19 entry 20 (LR 5.143), above the 3.841 cutoff. Do not scale K=1 profile, bootstrap, Wald, t-Wald, percentile, or endpoint-profile reruns; source-specific phylo lv remains blocked.

The phylo Model A v1 decision is now explicit: public source-specific phylo lv is retired/parked for v1. Any future non-v1 branch must authorize a changed realized/sampling-conditional target with a fresh ADEMP gate. Wald is acceptable only for conditional alpha axis/access-effect output. Profile-LR is the canary for a changed target only; no bootstrap, endpoint-profile fan-out, grammar widening, PR reopen, or production compute follows from the failed old route.

Bench-only profile_direct_slope canary now computes B_lv_direct_slope from saturated Y ~ X_lv slopes and constrains selected B_lv entries to that realized target. Tiny local smoke at p=5,n_sites=60,K=1,lambda=0.5 passed 2/2 selected entries with LR 0.0895 and 1.6022 below the 3.8415 cutoff. This proves diagnostic tooling only; no source-specific lv grammar, no production compute, no bootstrap rescue, and no population B_lv claim.

Early realized-target diagnostics were positive: K=1 p=20,n_sites=200 five-seed selected-entry canary passed 25/25 entries with max LR 3.6595 < 3.8415, and the old failed population-target task-8 entry-71 row at p=80,K=2 passed under B_lv_direct_slope with LR 0.00569 < 3.8415. This row is superseded by the 20-rep strict-gate result below.

K=1 profile_direct_slope promotion diagnostic fired the strict stop rule: 20/20 fits converged, 100/100 selected entries usable, and 96/100 included B_lv_direct_slope, but four converged selected entries missed the LR cutoff. Misses were task 7 entry 5 (LR 5.651), task 10 entry 5 (LR 6.661), task 16 entry 5 (LR 5.440), and task 17 entry 20 (LR 5.624). Aggregate coverage is nominal-compatible at this small denominator, but the no-miss canary failed. Do not expose source-specific phylo lv; same-route scaling is retired.

Public source-specific phylo lv is now retired/parked for v1 under the current evidence. PR #127 remains closed/parked, phylo_latent(..., lv = ~ x) stays fail-loud, and no compute is active. Future work must start from a newly predeclared ADEMP target/gate before profile-LR, Totoro diagnostics, DRAC claim evidence, or R grammar exposure can resume.

Source guards, mixed-family point boundary, and R-Julia bridge matrix truth are the active planning/verification slice. Boole keeps source-specific lv fail-loud, Hopper owns bridge ledger parity, Fisher blocks interval overclaims, Curie owns focused guard tests, Grace owns local preview, and Rose blocks partial-support wording. No package API widening, no grammar exposure, no PR reopen, and no compute launch.
@Ayumi-495 has now been given the main-branch install route after PR #581 merged and pkgdown deployed.

serial_gates.text: PR #581 is merged and post-merge main/pkgdown are green. Ordinary axis/trait extractor slice can be treated as mainline.

The profile-LR truth canary did not pass for task 8 entry 71, and the K=1 20-replicate selected-entry diagnostic gate covered only 98/100 after converged misses. The profile_direct_slope route also failed the strict K=1 20-replicate no-miss canary despite 96/100 aggregate coverage. Source-specific phylo lv is retired/parked for v1; future exposure requires a newly predeclared ADEMP target/gate first. Do not restart bootstrap.
Keep alpha axis_effect, B_lv trait_effect, Julia bridge point routes, and phylo/mixed-family blocked rows separate.
The R bridge admits only the complete balanced Gaussian + Poisson + Binomial point/postfit row. Unsupported mixed components use GJL-GATE-MIXED-COMPONENTS; mixed-family X/X_lv/masks/CIs stay blocked.

blockers.text: Phylo Model A production coverage is blocked/parked for v1. bootstrap_basic is not a rescue route: 591/720 = 0.821 observed and at most 0.839 with a perfect cancelled task 1. The local seed-matched profile_truth canary missed task 8 entry 71 with LR 9.9918 > 3.8415, the K=1 population-target gate covered only 98/100, and the profile_direct_slope K=1 20-replicate gate fired the strict no-miss stop rule at 96/100. Any future non-v1 path needs a newly predeclared estimand/gate.

Same-route bootstrap, Wald, t-Wald, percentile, bootstrap_basic, population profile_truth, and current profile_direct_slope reruns are retired. Profile-LR can return only after a genuinely revised target/gate. Totoro may be used only for small diagnostics after the target changes; DRAC denominators stay seed-matched and separate.
Source-specific phylo/animal/spatial/kernel lv syntax remains fail-loud. Ordinary latent(lv = ~ x) evidence must not be reused to promote phylo_latent(..., lv = ~ x).

Mixed-family LV has no V1 evidence. The bridge row is point/postfit only for complete balanced Gaussian + Poisson + Binomial vectors; fixed X, predictor-informed X_lv, masks, missing responses, and CIs remain blocked.
Do not call source-specific phylo lv partial support. Mission Control language must say retired/parked for v1 after the profile_truth and profile_direct_slope misses, not pending support.

Bench-only profile_direct_slope had positive early canaries, but the K=1 20-replicate strict gate failed at 96/100 with four converged misses. Source-specific phylo lv is retired/parked for v1; future work must start with a newly predeclared ADEMP target/gate, not same-route scaling.

parallel_lanes.text: This lane updates guard tests and Mission Control only. It is not a package API, likelihood, source-specific grammar, PR reopen, or large-compute change.

agents.name: Noether
agents.task: Keep alpha axis_effect and B_lv trait_effect algebra distinct: alpha is the default axis/CLV coefficient; B_lv = Lambda alpha^T is the explicit trait-scale induced effect.

collaborator_table.user_question: Can I fit lv = ~ x and interpret effects?
collaborator_table.safe_now: Yes for named ordinary regimes; after PR #581 merges, extract_lv_effects() defaults to axis_effect alpha with SE/CIs.
collaborator_table.partial_caveat: Alpha intervals are Wald/conditional on the fitted axis convention; B_lv trait effects are explicit via type = "trait_effect".
collaborator_table.boundary: Do not claim full LV arc, source-specific phylo lv, mixed families, or calibrated Julia bridge CIs.
No CI calibration, masks, X + X_lv, or mixed claim.

collaborator_table.partial_caveat: GLLVM.jl Model A targeted evidence exists, but the weak-cell interval diagnostic is blocked.
collaborator_table.boundary: No source-specific lv grammar exposure in v1; future exposure needs structural redesign with fresh evidence.

matrix.evidence: B_lv recovery and ordinary Gaussian r500 Wald/t coverage are merged. PR #581 adds the default axis_effect alpha view with Wald SE/CIs on main.
matrix.next_gate: Do not widen beyond named ordinary Gaussian regimes without new evidence.

matrix.capability: Default axis_effect alpha SE/CIs plus explicit trait_effect B_lv SE/CIs
matrix.evidence: PR #581 merged at 12526a15 with post-merge main R-CMD-check run 28476941515 and pkgdown run 28477809749 green. extract_lv_effects() defaults to axis_effect; alpha rows include std.error/lower/upper when sdreport is usable; type = "trait_effect" returns B_lv with SE/CIs. Public reference page is deployed.
matrix.next_gate: Keep alpha intervals conditional on fitted axis convention and do not widen beyond named ordinary regimes without new evidence.

matrix.evidence: Point routes, parser guards, multi-trial recovery, Bernoulli depth, and rank-1 multi-trial logit/probit/cloglog r500 Wald interval evidence are merged through PR #580 at 20f09546 with post-merge CI/pkgdown green.
matrix.next_gate: Broader native non-Gaussian, nonstandard binomial, masks, source/tier, mixed-family, and Julia CI claims need separate evidence.

matrix.evidence: PR #574 merged ordinary Gaussian factor-predictor runtime/recovery, rare nonempty factor level smoke, and empty-level rejection. PR CI, post-merge main R-CMD-check, and pkgdown run 28414994265 are green.

matrix.evidence: GLLVM.jl targeted Model A code/tests exist locally, but production exposure is retired/parked for v1. The p=80,K=2,lambda=0.5 weak-cell diagnostic shows bootstrap_basic cannot reach the coverage gate, direct slopes track B_lv rather than exposing an extractor artifact, local profile_truth missed task 8 entry 71, and K=1 20-replicate profile_truth covered only 98/100 selected entries. Bench-only profile_direct_slope computes B_lv_direct_slope and passed early canaries, but the K=1 20-replicate strict gate failed: 96/100 included truth, with four converged selected-entry misses and max LR 6.6614 > 3.8415.
matrix.next_gate: No v1 R exposure. Future work requires a newly predeclared ADEMP estimand/gate before profile-LR or compute resumes.

matrix.evidence: R-Julia bridge truth-lock: the only mixed-family bridge row is complete balanced Gaussian + Poisson + Binomial point/postfit with no fixed X, no predictor-informed X_lv, no masks, no missing responses, no newdata, and no CIs. Native mixed-family latent(lv = ~ x) remains fail-loud.
matrix.next_gate: A separate mixed-family parity slice is required before widening components, X/X_lv, masks, or intervals.

matrix.capability: GLLVM.jl phylo Model A DRAC launcher
matrix.evidence: Launcher branch closeout at local 7d6985d: observed bootstrap_basic rows are 591/720 = 0.821; even a perfect cancelled task 1 would be 671/800 = 0.839. Narval direct-mean comparator completed and supports finite-sample slope shrinkage, not extraction failure. The later K=1 local profile gate failed at 98/100 selected-entry truth inclusion, and the profile_direct_slope K=1 20-replicate strict gate failed at 96/100 with four converged misses.
matrix.next_gate: No more production fan-out until the estimand/gate genuinely changes and is predeclared.

evidence.text: PR #581 merged to main as 12526a15 at 2026-06-30T21:26:16Z.

Post-merge pkgdown run 28477809749 built and deployed successfully at 12526a15.
Deployed extract_lv_effects reference page shows axis_effect default, conf.level, alpha_lv_B SEs, and ADREPORT(B_lv_unit) trait-effect SEs.

Phylo bootstrap_basic closeout: valid observed rows reached 591/720 = 0.821; even a perfect cancelled task 1 would be 671/800 = 0.839. Direct-mean comparator confirmed saturated slopes track B_lv, so the failure is finite-sample slope/interval calibration, not extraction.

compute_status.role: fast local compute when a route is worth running
compute_status.note: Remember Totoro is available under the shared core cap, but do not launch more phylo bootstrap_basic or endpoint-profile repeats. Use Totoro only for small diagnostics after a redesigned target/regime is locked.

Narval endpoint-profile jobs 64463813, 64466208, and 64468504 produced no profile result; capped exact job 64471433 could not be read because Narval login/status reads stalled. A local seed-matched profile_truth canary for task 8 entry 71 missed truth with LR 9.9918 > 3.8415, and K=1 20-replicate profile_truth covered only 98/100 selected entries. No active compute is claimed.

compute_status.role: 10-seed saturated Y~X_lv comparator for B_lv weak cell
compute_status.note: mle_slope_mean=1.000455 and ols_slope_mean=1.000468 overall; task 8 slopes were about 0.536 and 0.533 of truth. This supports finite-sample realized-slope shrinkage rather than extractor distortion.
Observed rows contributed to the 591/720 = 0.821 aggregate. A perfect cancelled task 1 would still leave the 10-seed aggregate at 671/800 = 0.839, below the 0.92 gate.

compute_status.role: p=80 K=2 lambda=0.5 B_lv bootstrap_basic weak cell
compute_status.note: Combined valid observed rows with Nibi/Rorqual/Totoro bookkeeping show bootstrap_basic cannot clear the gate; no production coverage claim.
Useful as a local stress host, but Julia 1.12 did not reproduce the same B_true stream as DRAC Julia 1.10 for identical seeds. Keep Totoro provenance separate.
Rorqual fixed-source race was cancelled. Trillium was load-tested but held because small jobs reserve whole 192-core nodes.
